llm_instruction: Use this file only after a candidate job was selected. Copy the BASF URL exactly from job.url; never construct job links.

job.title: GDE/EA - SAP Consultant HR Payroll (M/F/D)
job.description: Key Responsibilities • Consult European HR and payroll stakeholders on SAP Payroll European (Spain, Belgium) requirements • Design and implement Europe specific payroll schemas, rules, and calculations • Customize SAP Payroll and develop enhancements using ABAP / ABAP OO • Ensure solution quality via testing, payroll validation, and production support • Work in an Agile / DevOps setup within a global HR Solutions product team • Support S/4HANA Payroll evolution and automation initiatives ________________________________________ Required Profile • Several years of hands on experience in SAP Payroll Europe, ideally S/4HANA / H4S4 • Ideally: Knowledge of Spanish and/or Belgium payroll legislation and processes (gross to net, schemas, PCRs) • Solid ABAP / ABAP OO and payroll customizing skills • Experience supporting Germany from an offshore (India) setup • Fluent English; German is a plus ________________________________________ Nice to Have • Time Management ↔ Payroll integration experience • SAP Fiori / UI5 exposure • Experience with payroll automation or RPA
